title: DFU - Three Easy Steps page - Disconnecting/Connecting earbuds to check DFU pop up
scenario: DFU "Three Easy Steps" page does not show "Update currently not available" popup when earbud is disconnected and reconnected during update
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Tap on the connected Poly Bluetooth earbuds device name to open Device Settings.
Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) from the settings menu.
Wait for the 'Three Easy Steps' page to appear.
While on the 'Three Easy Steps' page, disconnect one earbud (right or left) by placing it back in the charging case or turning off Bluetooth on the earbud.
Attempt to start the firmware update by tapping the update/start button.
Observe the popup message displayed on screen.
While the earbud remains disconnected, verify the popup persists on screen.
Tap the 'OK' button on the popup.
Observe the screen after dismissing the popup.
expected: A popup with the message 'Update currently not available, please try back later' is displayed. The popup persists as long as the earbud is disconnected. After tapping OK, the popup dismisses and the user is returned to the 'Three Easy Steps' page.
